data: Revise how to handle interruptions politely

message: Let's revise how to handle interruptions calmly and professionally.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: Remember the structure you learned:

"I understand [point], and if I may just add [response]."

This structure keeps conversations respectful by acknowledging the other person before adding your point.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/e38a92a9-01d0-408b-8043-b6f538f2c9e3-56.-Handling-Interruptions.jpg
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now let's practice using this structure again.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/e38a92a9-01d0-408b-8043-b6f538f2c9e3-56.-Handling-Interruptions.jpg
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to continue speaking after an interruption

1.I understand your feedback, and if I may just add that the team has made the corrections.
2.You have already said your feedback but I was not done explaining the situation.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to add a point after being interrupted

1.I understand the priority has changed, and if I may just add that I will adjust my plan accordingly.
2.Okay fine the priority has changed but I want to say something first.

Correct answer: 1

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. Someone cuts you off while you are sharing your project update. How do you respond politely?'

'2. A team member speaks over you in a group discussion. How do you handle it?'

'3. Your manager interrupts you during a report presentation. How do you politely continue?'

'4. A colleague keeps interrupting your ideas in a brainstorming session. How do you respond?'

'5. You are explaining a solution and someone cuts in. How do you handle the interruption?'"
